goal.description: Collect 4 keys to unlock and complete Chains

description: Turn this on if you want Battle Challenge levels included as locations.
Easter egg checks include the flower pots in the four main branches, the sandcastle in Ruins, the picnic table in Stability, and the arachtoid in the Intro level.
If turned on, Supercharge Mode is unlockable.
NOTE: Some randomizer logic with supercharge can be hard (e.g. Defiance levels without a gun). Disable if you don't want this.
If turned on, Assault Mode is unlockable.
If turned on, levels with both Legacy and 2020 variants will have their Legacy variants included as locations.
NOTE: This setting and Enable 2020 Level Variants may both be enabled (in which case both variants appear).
NOTE: If Supercharge, Assault, or Easter egg checks are on, some randomizer logic may require you to play the Supercharge/Assault/Legacy variants of levels even if this setting is disabled.
If turned on, levels with both Legacy and 2020 variants will have their 2020 variants included as locations.
NOTE: This setting and Enable Legacy Level Variants may both be enabled (in which case both variants appear).
- Completing a challenge mode version of a level (Fragile, No Ammo, Beacons, Pathfinder). You can choose any level for this (even ones you have already completed).
- Listen to Demi monologue. Open the computer in the hospital room, double click one of the text logs, and listen to Demi read it.
- Play golf. Go to Custom Levels and complete the level 'Mini Golf? But Worse!'
